segments.beat: hands hold device over leafy plant background, front face visible
device rotated, both hands adjusting grip, shell and PCB area partially visible
continued rotation and handling, device tilted showing side profile
hands reposition device closer to camera, screen face toward lens
device held steady against plant background, full front view

selection_note: Low-info clip — device handled over a plant background with no active display or clear shell transparency reveal; pocket-scale is readable but no hero claims land with strength.

aesthetics.weakness: handheld drift, device nearly invisible, flat/gray exposure
aesthetics.note: camera wanders around a houseplant with minimal device presence; raw b-roll, not a product shot
